## Problem

What workflow is hard or missing today?

## Proposal

What should LectureScribe do?

## Source type

Does this affect links, `.txt` files, local media, transcripts, setup, release packaging, or UI?

## Notes

Add screenshots, examples, or links if useful. Do not include API keys or private media links.
